generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder positioned behind the gearbox for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor collecting input current data from the permanent magnet synchronous motor for performance monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
    base:desc "Time series motor position angle data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
    base:desc "Time series gearbox position angle data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Time series motor input current data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series position angle data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, MontiArcAutomatonEnabler, SysMLStateMachineEnabler, AnalyticsProcessingEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series position angle data from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, MontiArcAutomatonEnabler, SysMLStateMachineEnabler, AnalyticsProcessingEnabler
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series input current data from motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, AnalyticsProcessingEnabler
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated by comparing simulated data against measured physical system data, where deviation serves as the primary validation metric. The system addresses inaccuracies in robot motion through continuous calibration, as specified in the solution scope to improve overall motion accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for sensor data transmission; no details on network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, or security protocols are specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML [17] for systems engineering modeling, ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25,26] for architecture description languages, and SysML Internal Block Diagrams (IBDs) [17,27], facilitating interoperability among heterogeneous stakeholders and systems [31]."
]
